title: Evolution Power Tools D255SEG-CS Diamond Blade For Disc Cutters - Segmented Edge For Cutting Masonry, Such as Brick, Reinforced Concrete and Stone, 255 mm
features: Compatible with the R255DCT Concrete Cutting Saw
Quality diamond edge delivers heavy-duty performance
Easily cuts with outstanding performance on both hard and abrasive masonry, hard brick, pavers, stone, concrete, and steel re-inforced concrete
description: From the manufacturer PERFECT FOR CUTTING: Reinforced Concrete Brick Stone Paving Stone IDEAL FOR: Demolition Made for breaking down multi-materials, the high speed cutting nature of the segmented rim makes it perfect for foundations & walls Landscaping With such a variety of masonry used when it comes to a garden, the segmented rim makes light work of flagstone to coping stone Window Installation For the segmented rim blade, cutting through brick is elementary. An ideal choice when it comes to jobs like installing windows Segmented Rim & Gullets For improved air flow, dissipate heat, and remove slurry from the cut, helping to maintain the blade’s cutting performance. Perfect for: Reinforced concrete, brick, paving slabs, stone & more 230mm Diamond Blade 255mm Diamond Blade 300mm Diamond Blade 305mm Diamond Blade Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 239 4.5 out of 5 stars 239 4.5 out of 5 stars 239 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,189 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £24.98 £ 24 . 98 £24.11 £ 24 . 11 — no data Dia.
